document.title: Risk Management Report for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW

sourceSummary.oneLine: Risk management report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents risk management activities, residual risk acceptability, production and post-production information, and applicable regulations and standards for the medical device.
keyPoints: Product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and model name is A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW.
Revision 6 is dated Dec/31/2024 and described as a production and post-production information update.
The device classification is IIb and expected service life is approximately 5 years.
Applicable national and regional regulations listed are Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and Medical Device Act in Korea.
After risk control, all 43 identified residual risks were evaluated in the acceptable region.
The first information collection period for production and post-production information is May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: This is a document for the H&abyz Co., Ltd. to establish and document a risk management plan in accordance with the risk management procedure.

concepts.name: Risk management
concepts.evidence: risk management activities on Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, identified the known and foreseeable hazards associated with the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Residual risk
concepts.evidence: All identified residual risks evaluated after implementation of the risk control measures, are distributed in an acceptable region.

concepts.name: Benefit-risk analysis
concepts.evidence: ISO 14971:2019 allows the manufacturer to perform a benefit-risk analysis for those risks that are not judged acceptable

concepts.name: Reasonably foreseeable misuse
concepts.evidence: Might be misused by maintenance and calibration error of operator.

concepts.name: Essential performance
concepts.evidence: Manufacturer shall identify which functions are Essential Performance.

evidence.claim: The document is a Risk Management Report for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk Management Report for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW
evidence.pageTarget: Risk Management Report for A1717MCW A1417MCW F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The document revision is Rev.6 dated December 31, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: 6 Dec/31/2024 Production and post-production information update
evidence.pageTarget: Risk Management Report for A1717MCW A1417MCW F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The report was prepared, reviewed, and approved on December 31, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared by R&D team Han, Jimin December 31, 2024 Reviewed by R&D Manager Kim, Myeongseop December 31, 2024 Approved by Quality Manager Hur, Namkyu December 31, 2024
evidence.pageTarget: Risk Management Report for A1717MCW A1417MCW F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The expected service life is approximately 5 years.
The intended purpose is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The device is not to be used for mammography, infants and pregnant women, fluoroscopy, or angiography.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography. Not to be used for infant and pregnant women. Not to be used for fluoroscopy and angiography.

evidence.claim: Applicable regulations listed include Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and Medical Device Act in Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: European Union Regulation (EU) 2017/745 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 5 April 2017 Republic of Korea Medical Device Act in Korea

evidence.claim: Risk acceptability criteria define acceptable risk as levels 1 to 4 and unacceptable risk as levels 5 to 25.
evidence.evidenceText: Acceptable Risk (A): Acceptable Region, Green Zone, Risk levels: 1~4 Unacceptable Risk (U): Unacceptable Region, Red Zone, Risk levels: 5~25

evidence.claim: Before risk control, 43 risks were identified, with 2 acceptable and 41 unacceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: Through the identification of known and foreseeable hazards, 43 risks were identified and estimated. Acceptable region: 2 ea Unacceptable region: 41 ea

evidence.claim: After risk control, all 43 identified residual risks were acceptable.
Overall residual risks are determined to be acceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: Overall residual risk posed by the medical device are all acceptable.

evidence.claim: Production and post-production information is obtained through A-TCF-5-161 Post-Market Surveillance.
evidence.evidenceText: Refer to A-TCF-5-161 Post-Market Surveillance for getting the information of production and post- production phases.

evidence.claim: The first production and post-production information collection period was May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: 1st Information Collection Period: May 06, 2024(Initial CE marking) ~ December 31, 2024

evidence.claim: No customer feedback incidents were recorded for 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Customer feedback Years Device Function Packaging Incident 2024 0 0 0 0

evidence.claim: No incident feedback report cases were recorded for MFDS, FDA, or MHRA in 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Incident feedback Years Report Cases MFDS FDA MHRA 2024 0 0 0

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is FDA, but the applicable national and regional regulations section lists European Union and Republic of Korea; FDA appears only in the incident feedback table.
Some text appears to contain OCR or source transcription issues, including typos and inconsistent standard references such as EN 15322-1 versus EN 15223-1.
